{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Perfected Combat Artists
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Perfected Combat Artists]] can lend Aetheric weight to a strike.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
